english_first.policy: Deterministic pre-board trims the broad scan before mini sees it; Board Judge and final translation are mini-first, with gpt-4o automatic fallback only for the single lead item.

translation_memory.policy: Reuse Russian draft_line only when fingerprint and compact fact signature match; changed facts force fresh LLM rewrite.

repair_rejections.title: When is it too hot to work under UK law as temperatures forecast to hit 37C
quality_errors: draft_line contains number(s) not present in candidate evidence: 37.
repair_rejections.draft_line_excerpt: • В связи с прогнозируемой температурой в 37°C в Манчестере работникам напоминают о юридических обязательствах касательно температур на рабочем месте. Работодатели должны обеспечивать комфортные условия труда.

repair_rejections.title: Will Manchester schools close this week as temperatures hit 38C?
